headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -132.4)
key_insights: Fears trending up 268% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 135 quotes and an exceptionally high 91 strong-intensity posts - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 95.7 sits in the upper half of the historical range and doubled from yesterday's already elevated level.

• Fears also spiked significantly from yesterday with 21 strong-intensity quotes, while optimism turned negative despite having some strong posts.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
